Join the Community
🌍 a community for women

gals who travel

Real trips, real friendships. Gals Who Travel brings together solo female travellers for group adventures around the world. Explore new destinations, make deep connections and adventure further safely. All trips include accommodation, activities, transport and a local guide to show you the hidden spots you can't find on TikTok!!!

why gals who travel?

explore the world with the best gals

Whether you're nervous for your first solo trip, you just want to explore new destinations without the stress of planning it all or you can't seem to get the girls holiday out the group chat, join a Gals Who Travel trip and meet like minded amazing girls from around the world with everything sorted!!
